entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00018) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE AN UPDATED PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS) AND TO INCORPORATE A REVISED CONTRACT SECURITY CLASSIFICATION SPECIFICATION (DD FORM 254).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56KGY17D0006 (P00020) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00020, ISSUED AGAINST W56KGY-17-D-0006 IS TO UPDATE THE GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP) IN SECTION J, ATTACHMENT 0004. THIS REVISED GFP SHALL REPLACE THE PRIOR GFP IN ITS ENTIRETY.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PURSUANT TO 10 UNITES STATES CODE 3204(A)(1), FAR 6.302-1, THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION P00024, IS TO EXTEND CONTRACT W56KGY-17-D-0006 ORDERING PERIOD BY AN ADDITIONAL 39.5 MONTHS AND TO INCREASE THE CONTRACT CEILING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
